scripts.test: npm run test:unit && npm run test:e2e
scripts.test:e2e: NODE_OPTIONS='--import tsx' DATABASE_URL=file:./.tmp/e2e.db DOCUMENTS_DIR=./.tmp/documents playwright test
scripts.desktop:dev: concurrently -k "tsc -p desktop/electron/tsconfig.json --watch" "next dev -p 3000" "wait-on http://localhost:3000 && wait-on desktop/dist-electron/main.js && ELECTRON_NEXT_URL=http://localhost:3000 electron desktop/dist-electron/main.js"
scripts.desktop:build: node scripts/build-template-db.mjs && next build && node scripts/fix-standalone-symlinks.mjs && node scripts/rebuild-better-sqlite3-for-electron.mjs && tsc -p desktop/electron/tsconfig.json
scripts.desktop:dist: npm run desktop:build && cross-env ELECTRON_BUILDER_CACHE=./.cache/electron-builder electron-builder --projectDir desktop --config electron-builder.json
scripts.desktop:dist:mac: npm run desktop:build && cross-env ELECTRON_BUILDER_CACHE=./.cache/electron-builder electron-builder --projectDir desktop --config electron-builder.json --mac
scripts.desktop:dist:win: npm run desktop:build && cross-env ELECTRON_BUILDER_CACHE=./.cache/electron-builder electron-builder --projectDir desktop --config electron-builder.json --win
scripts.desktop:dist:linux: npm run desktop:build && cross-env ELECTRON_BUILDER_CACHE=./.cache/electron-builder electron-builder --projectDir desktop --config electron-builder.json --linux
scripts.desktop:dist:all: npm run desktop:build && cross-env ELECTRON_BUILDER_CACHE=./.cache/electron-builder electron-builder --projectDir desktop --config electron-builder.json --mac --win --linux
